# Title: Request European VAT requirement exemption

Title: Request European VAT requirement exemption

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ

Markdown Content:
This article applies to selling in: **United States**

On this page

## What is a European VAT requirement notification?

A European VAT requirement notification means Amazon has identified that you are selling in EU countries without providing valid VAT registration numbers.

If you have a Small and Medium-sized Enterprise (SME) VAT exemption number, you can request relief from this enforcement.

## Do you qualify for SME VAT exemption relief?

You can request exemption from the European VAT requirement if you meet ALL the following criteria:

*   **Received a European VAT Notification**: You have active notifications on your **Account Health** dashboard
*   **EU Business**: Established in an EU country (excluding Spain)
*   **Valid SME number**: Have an SME exemption number ending in "EX"
*   **Below thresholds**: EU sales under €100,000 + individual country sales below limits
*   **Active exemption**: SME status is active for the affected countries

## Request SME VAT exemption relief

1.   Access your **Account Health** dashboard[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

1.   Access your **Account Health** dashboard[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Sign in to Seller Central.
    2.   Navigate to **Performance**>**Account Health** .
    3.   Go to your **Account Health** dashboard. VAT-related issues and notifications will appear on your screen. 

2.   View the European VAT requirements.[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Click **European VAT registration requirements**.
    2.   Review the VAT enforcement notification details.

3.   Access the Exemption Request form.[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Click **If you would like to request an extension or exemption from these requirements, submit the required documents**. This starts the formal exemption request process.

4.   Select your exemption request type[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Select **I understand the policy requirements and would like to request more time to meet the requirement or provide evidence to prove I don't need to meet this requirement**.
    2.   From the dropdown menu, select **Other**.

5.   Complete the SME exemption request[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Enter the following information in the **Please explain why** text box:
        *   European VAT requirement enforcement relief: SME VAT Exemption Request
        *   SME exemption number: [Your complete number ending in "EX"]
        *   Countries affected by VAS Enforcement: [List countries where you're blocked]
        *   Business establishment country: [Your home EU country]

6.   Obtain and attach SME verification proof[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Visit the [EU SME verification portal](https://ec.europa.eu/taxation_customs/sme-verification/#/sme-verification).
    2.   Enter your SME exemption number.
    3.   Click **Verify**.
    4.   Take a screenshot that includes the following:
        *   Your **VALID** SME number
        *   Countries where exemption is **ACTIVE**
        *   Current verification date

7.   Submit your request[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G845WL5WS98BEQPQ)

    1.   Check that all information is accurate.
    2.   Enture your SME number exactly mathces the verification screenshot.
    3.   Click **Submit**.
    4.   Save your case reference number from the confirmation.
